name: Gorre Dinesh Chandan Reddy

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms (C++), Object-Oriented Programming System(OOPS), Database Managment System(DBMS), Software Engineering,Computer Networks,Deep Learning

points: Developed and deployed ML models and data pipelines for product data analysis, leveraging skills in data science and machine learning.
Designed and implemented RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems using vector databases, text splitters, retrievers, and Hugging Face LLM API integration.
Built production-grade Python backends, optimized prompt pipelines, and contributed to internal AI tools and automation workflows.
Created a Flask application and hosted it on AWS EC2, showcasing skills in backend development and cloud computing.
Worked on an AI platform that enables B2B SaaS sales teams to generate personalized product demos for prospects.

projects.title: Image-Based Entity Extraction with PyTesseract
points: Employed OCR technology to extract key information from product images, demonstrating ability to work with image data.
Achieved 56% accuracy on the test dataset, showcasing model effectiveness in extracting relevant data despite image quality challenges.
Processed a large dataset, handling over 130,000 test images and identifying potential challenges.

projects.title: Mars Landmark Detection System
points: Developed an end-to-end deep learning project using TensorFlow and Keras to detect landmarks in images of Mars, showcasing skills in machine learning and computer vision.
Trained a model to classify images into eight classes representing various Martian landmarks, achieving an accuracy of 89% on the test dataset.
Handled over 8,200 training images and 2,000 testing images, demonstrating ability to work with large datasets.

achievements: Amazon ML Challenge - Top 200 out of 18500 teams
